content: Hi, I need help updating my billing address to 742 Evergreen Terrace, Springfield.
I can help with that. Could you confirm your account email?
Sure, it's homer.simpson@example.com and my phone is (555) 012-3456.
Thank you. I've updated your billing address on file.
Also my date of birth is dob: 1965-05-12, in case you need it for verification.
